sourceSummary.oneLine: Spreadsheet rows list purchased electronic components for S4335-WV PBA INTERFACE MAIN, including internal part numbers, component specifications, approved manufacturer part numbers, suppliers, quantities, currencies, and unit prices.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports DHF/DMR design and purchasing traceability for detector PBA components by linking assembly S4335-WV / MI99-01327C to component specifications and supplier/manufacturer sourcing data.
keyPoints: Rows repeatedly identify model S4335-WV and assembly MI99-01327C, PBA INTERFACE MAIN.
Component classes include R-CHIP, R-NETWORK, and C-CER,CHIP parts with electrical ratings and package details.
Supplier/manufacturer entities include ROHM Semiconductor Korea, Yageo, ABCO Electronics, Samsung Electro-Mechanics, Vishay Sprague, Korea Murata Electronics, Samwha Capacitor, and AVX.
The chunk contains purchasing fields such as PC unit, PBA classification, quantity, currency, and unit price.

entities.name: S4335-WV
entities.evidence: Every populated row begins with S4335-WV and ends with combined identifiers such as S4335-WV2007-007317.

entities.name: MI99-01327C
entities.evidence: Rows pair S4335-WV with MI99-01327C and description PBA INTERFACE MAIN.

entities.name: PBA INTERFACE MAIN
entities.evidence: Rows state PBA INTERFACE MAIN and classify the purchasing unit as PBA.

entities.name: ROHM SEMICONDUCTOR KOREA CORPORATIO
entities.evidence: Supplier field appears for multiple R-CHIP and R-NETWORK rows, including part numbers 2007-007317 and 2011-000818.

entities.name: YAGEO CORPORATION
entities.evidence: Rows list YAGEO CORPORATION for R-CHIP parts such as 300Kohm part 2007-007720 and 0ohm part 2007-008779.

entities.name: ABCO ELECTRONICS CO.,LTD.
entities.evidence: Rows list ABCO ELECTRONICS CO.,LTD. for 2Kohm R-CHIP part 2007-007766 and 33ohm R-NETWORK part 2011-001261.

entities.name: SAMSUNG ELECTRO-MECHANICS CO., LTD.
entities.evidence: Rows list SAMSUNG ELECTRO-MECHANICS CO., LTD. for 24.9ohm R-CHIP part 2007-009165 and 22nF capacitor part 2203-002398.

entities.name: KOREA MURATA ELECTRONICS CO.,LTD.
entities.evidence: Rows list KOREA MURATA ELECTRONICS CO.,LTD. for multiple ceramic capacitor entries including 2203-000041, 2203-000438, and 2203-002285.

concepts.name: PBA component procurement traceability
concepts.pageTarget: S4335-WV PBA INTERFACE MAIN purchasing BOM
concepts.evidence: Rows link S4335-WV, MI99-01327C, PBA INTERFACE MAIN, internal part numbers, component descriptions, suppliers, quantities, currencies, and prices.

concepts.name: R-CHIP component specification
concepts.evidence: R-CHIP rows include values and ratings such as 2.2Kohm, 1%, 1/16W, TP, 1005, T0.35 and 300Kohm, 1%, 1/10W, TP, 1608.

concepts.name: R-NETWORK component specification
concepts.evidence: R-NETWORK rows include 100Kohm, 5%, 1/16W, L, CHIP, 8P, TP, 3.2x1.6x0.5mm and 33ohm, 5%, 1/16W, L, CHIP, 8P, TP, 2.0x1.0x0.35mm.

concepts.name: Ceramic chip capacitor specification
concepts.evidence: C-CER,CHIP rows include capacitance, tolerance, voltage, dielectric, packaging, and size, such as 10nF, 10%, 50V, X7R, TP, 1608.

evidence.claim: The chunk is a purchasing/BOM excerpt for S4335-WV PBA INTERFACE MAIN.
evidence.evidenceText: Rows repeatedly show S4335-WV, MI99-01327C, PBA INTERFACE MAIN, PC, PBA, and combined keys such as S4335-WVPBA INTERFACE MAINPBA.
evidence.pageTarget: S4335-WV PBA INTERFACE MAIN purchasing BOM

evidence.claim: The PBA uses multiple chip resistor values with internal 2007-series part numbers.
evidence.evidenceText: Examples include 2007-007317 R-CHIP 2.2Kohm, 2007-007720 R-CHIP 300Kohm, 2007-008779 R-CHIP 0ohm, and 2007-010072 R-CHIP 0.001ohm.

evidence.claim: The PBA includes resistor network components with internal 2011-series part numbers.
evidence.evidenceText: Rows list 2011-000818 R-NETWORK 100Kohm, 5%, 1/16W, CHIP, 8P and 2011-001261 R-NETWORK 33ohm, 5%, 1/16W, CHIP, 8P.

evidence.claim: The PBA includes ceramic chip capacitors with internal 2203-series part numbers.
evidence.evidenceText: Rows list C-CER,CHIP entries such as 2203-000041 0.01nF 50V C0G, 2203-000257 10nF 50V X7R, and 2203-005249 100nF 50V X7R.

evidence.claim: Component rows provide manufacturer part number alternates for procurement control.
evidence.evidenceText: The 2203-002285 C-CER,CHIP row lists alternates including C0402C103K5RAC, GRM155R71H103KA88D, CL05B103KB5NNNC, UMK105B7103KV-F, and 0402B103K500CT.

evidence.claim: The excerpt records purchasing quantity and price information.
evidence.evidenceText: Most rows show PC, PBA, quantity 10000, supplier, currency such as USD or KRW, and unit prices such as USD 0.001 or KRW 2.375.

reviewFlags.reason: The chunk lacks spreadsheet column headers, so field meanings are inferred from repeated row structure.
Many rows are duplicates and several fields contain #REF! or #N/A, indicating spreadsheet formula/reference artifacts.
No regulatory authority, certificate, test result, standard, software revision, cybersecurity, or submission data is present in this chunk.
